applicability_notes: Elementwise power with scalar exponent. Frequently appears as the leading op of decomposed RMSNorm (pow(x,2) -> mean -> rsqrt -> multiply), L2-normalize (pow(x,2) -> sum -> sqrt), GELU-tanh approximation (pow(x,3)), and RoPE inv_freq computation (pow(theta, exponents)). These larger chains are fusion candidates (e.g. into ttnn.rms_norm or ttnn.gelu).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: activation tensor [batch, 1, seq, hidden] in RMSNorm decomposition
placement_observations.source: _simplified_rmsnorm call site: input converted via ttnn.sharded_to_interleaved(inp, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) immediately before ttnn.pow(inp, 2)

placement_observations.size_descriptor: hidden-state tensor [B, S, H] for L2 normalization
placement_observations.source: _l2_normalize_ttnn call site: ttnn.to_memory_config(tt_tensor, ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG) before ttnn.pow(tt_tensor, 2)
unit tests: ttnn.from_torch(..., layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default memory config

placement_observations.size_descriptor: same shape as input; preallocated output tensor supported
placement_observations.source: unit tests: ttnn.pow(input_tensor, exponent, output_tensor=output_tensor, queue_id=cq_id)
